mapper.sql: id, course_id, student_id, images, total_questions, correct_count, score, status, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_homework_correction WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_homework_correction (course_id, student_id, images, total_questions, correct_count, score, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{studentId}, #{images}, #{totalQuestions}, #{correctCount}, #{score}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE edu_homework_correction
total_questions = #{totalQuestions}, correct_count = #{correctCount}, score = #{score}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_homework_correction SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edu_homework_correction WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND student_id = #{studentId} AND deleted = 0
